name: alpha_001_qrev_roe_roa
expr: rank(group_neutralize(add(multiply(0.55, ts_zscore(divide(ts_backfill(income, 252), ts_backfill(equity, 252)), 252)), multiply(0.45, ts_zscore(divide(ts_backfill(income, 252), ts_backfill(assets, 252)), 252))) * rank(reverse(ts_mean(divide(subtract(close, ts_delay(close, 1)), ts_delay(close, 1)), 10))), subindustry))

name: alpha_002_qrev_gpoa_margin
expr: rank(group_neutralize(add(multiply(0.6, ts_zscore(divide(ts_backfill(gross_income_total, 252), ts_backfill(assets, 252)), 252)), multiply(0.4, ts_zscore(divide(ts_backfill(gross_income_total, 252), add(ts_backfill(actual_sales_value_annual, 252), 0.001)), 252))) * rank(reverse(ts_mean(divide(subtract(close, ts_delay(close, 1)), ts_delay(close, 1)), 7))), subindustry))

name: alpha_003_qrev_fcfasset
expr: rank(group_neutralize(add(multiply(0.7, ts_zscore(divide(ts_backfill(free_cash_flow_total, 252), ts_backfill(assets, 252)), 252)), multiply(0.3, ts_zscore(divide(ts_backfill(cash_flow_from_operations, 252), ts_backfill(assets, 252)), 252))) * rank(reverse(ts_mean(divide(subtract(close, ts_delay(close, 1)), ts_delay(close, 1)), 15))), subindustry))

name: alpha_004_qrev_turnover
expr: rank(group_neutralize(add(multiply(0.5, ts_zscore(divide(ts_backfill(actual_sales_value_annual, 252), ts_backfill(assets, 252)), 252)), multiply(0.5, ts_zscore(ts_backfill(inventory_turnover, 252), 252))) * rank(reverse(ts_mean(divide(subtract(close, ts_delay(close, 1)), ts_delay(close, 1)), 12))), subindustry))

name: alpha_005_qrev_composite
expr: rank(group_neutralize(add(add(multiply(0.25, ts_zscore(divide(ts_backfill(income, 252), ts_backfill(equity, 252)), 252)), multiply(0.25, ts_zscore(divide(ts_backfill(income, 252), ts_backfill(assets, 252)), 252))), add(multiply(0.25, ts_zscore(divide(ts_backfill(gross_income_total, 252), ts_backfill(assets, 252)), 252)), multiply(0.25, ts_zscore(divide(ts_backfill(free_cash_flow_total, 252), ts_backfill(assets, 252)), 252)))) * rank(reverse(add(multiply(0.5, ts_mean(divide(subtract(close, ts_delay(close, 1)), ts_delay(close, 1)), 5)), multiply(0.5, ts_mean(divide(subtract(close, ts_delay(close, 1)), ts_delay(close, 1)), 20))))), subindustry))

name: alpha_006_qrev_stable_quality
expr: rank(group_neutralize(multiply(add(multiply(0.4, ts_zscore(divide(ts_backfill(income, 252), ts_backfill(equity, 252)), 252)), add(multiply(0.3, ts_zscore(divide(ts_backfill(gross_income_total, 252), ts_backfill(assets, 252)), 252)), multiply(0.3, ts_zscore(divide(ts_backfill(actual_sales_value_annual, 252), ts_backfill(assets, 252)), 252)))), rank(reverse(ts_mean(divide(subtract(close, ts_delay(close, 1)), ts_delay(close, 1)), 10))) * rank(reverse(ts_std_dev(divide(subtract(close, ts_delay(close, 1)), ts_delay(close, 1)), 20)))), subindustry))
